lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 请介绍一下你自己。
lines.pinyin: Qǐng jièshào yīxià nǐ zìjǐ.
lines.english: Please introduce yourself.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我叫张明，今年二十五岁，毕业于北京大学。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ jiào Zhāng Míng, jīnnián èrshíwǔ suì, bìyè yú Běijīng Dàxué.
lines.english: My name is Zhang Ming, I'm 25 years old, and I graduated from Peking University.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你为什么想在我们公司工作？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ wèishénme xiǎng zài wǒmen gōngsī gōngzuò?
lines.english: Why do you want to work at our company?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我对贵公司的业务很感兴趣，相信这里能给我提供发展的机会。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ duì guì gōngsī de yèwù hěn gǎn xìngqù, xiāngxìn zhèlǐ néng gěi wǒ tígōng fāzhǎn de jīhuì.
lines.english: I'm interested in your company's business and believe it can provide me with opportunities for development.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 您好，我想租房子。
lines.pinyin: Nín hǎo, wǒ xiǎng zū fángzi.
lines.english: Hello, I want to rent an apartment.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 您想租什么样的房子？
lines.pinyin: Nín xiǎng zū shénme yàng de fángzi?
lines.english: What kind of apartment are you looking for?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 离地铁站近一点儿的，一室一厅。
lines.pinyin: Lí dìtiězhàn jìn yīdiǎnr de, yī shì yī tīng.
lines.english: One close to the subway station, one bedroom and one living room.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 正好有一套，月租三千五，您想看看吗？
lines.pinyin: Zhènghǎo yǒu yī tào, yuèzū sānqiān wǔ, nín xiǎng kànkan ma?
lines.english: There happens to be one available, 3500 per month. Would you like to see it?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 假期你打算去哪儿旅游？
lines.pinyin: Jiàqī nǐ dǎsuàn qù nǎr lǚyóu?
lines.english: Where do you plan to travel during the holiday?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我想去西安，看看兵马俑。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng qù Xī'ān, kànkan Bīngmǎyǒng.
lines.english: I want to go to Xi'an to see the Terracotta Warriors.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 打算去几天？怎么去？
lines.pinyin: Dǎsuàn qù jǐ tiān? Zěnme qù?
lines.english: How many days? How will you get there?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 计划三天，坐高铁去比较方便。
lines.pinyin: Jìhuà sān tiān, zuò gāotiě qù bǐjiào fāngbiàn.
lines.english: Planning for three days, taking the high-speed train is more convenient.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 请问，我想办一张银行卡。
lines.pinyin: Qǐngwèn, wǒ xiǎng bàn yī zhāng yínhángkǎ.
lines.english: Excuse me, I want to open a bank card.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 好的，请出示您的身份证和护照。
lines.pinyin: Hǎo de, qǐng chūshì nín de shēnfènzhèng hé hùzhào.
lines.english: Sure, please show your ID card and passport.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 这是我的证件。大概需要多长时间？
lines.pinyin: Zhè shì wǒ de zhèngjiàn. Dàgài xūyào duō cháng shíjiān?
lines.english: Here are my documents. About how long will it take?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 大概十五分钟。请先填一下这张表格。
lines.pinyin: Dàgài shíwǔ fēnzhōng. Qǐng xiān tián yīxià zhè zhāng biǎogé.
lines.english: About 15 minutes. Please fill out this form first.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 最近空气污染很严重。
lines.pinyin: Zuìjìn kōngqì wūrǎn hěn yánzhòng.
lines.english: Air pollution has been serious lately.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 是啊，我们应该多坐公共交通，少开车。
lines.pinyin: Shì a, wǒmen yīnggāi duō zuò gōnggòng jiāotōng, shǎo kāichē.
lines.english: Yes, we should take more public transportation and drive less.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 除了这个，还有什么办法保护环境？
lines.pinyin: Chúle zhège, háiyǒu shénme bànfǎ bǎohù huánjìng?
lines.english: Besides that, what else can we do to protect the environment?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 节约用水用电，减少垃圾也很重要。
lines.pinyin: Jiéyuē yòngshuǐ yòngdiàn, jiǎnshǎo lājī yě hěn zhòngyào.
lines.english: Saving water and electricity, and reducing waste are also important.
